title: Mootthew's Mini PVP Tools
description: This expanded tool/weapon pack blocks much less of your vision.
body:
![Edited textures on a purple background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nngNhsQc/images/14f0a22716d49fb2948ec7023ed0d4e790f92db7.png)



Makes all tools take up less space in your hand.

Available for 1.21 and 1.8.9
